text.title: Evaluation Framework — Offline Harness + LLM-as-Judge + Production Sampling Core Rules

rule.statement: Harness MUST expose three classes: ModelEvaluator (offline), LLMJudge (scoring), ProductionEvaluator (live).
rule.rationale: Separation lets each class be tested independently; shared rubric ensures comparability.

rule.statement: All three classes MUST import the rubric from one module; never inline a copy.
rule.rationale: Inlined rubrics drift; one module guarantees offline/online alignment.

rule.statement: CI gate MUST express a numeric threshold (win-rate vs baseline >= X) — not a green/red boolean.
rule.rationale: Numeric thresholds let you tighten over time without code change.

rule.statement: Judge model temperature MUST be 0 (or top_p=0); reasoning_effort high if available.
rule.rationale: Deterministic judging is the only way to make scores reproducible.

rule.statement: Each judge call MUST return score + explanation; explanations land in the dashboard.
rule.rationale: Score-only outputs cannot be debugged or audited.
